releases.title: v3.4.28
releases.summary: This release documents the movie lookup rate-limit boundary and removes one avoidable TMDB search in the add/edit drawer when an identifier result already includes provider metadata.

releases.title: v3.4.27
releases.summary: This release tightens image and proof control language across drawer surfaces so cover images, event artifact images, and signature proof images use the same action vocabulary.

releases.title: v3.4.26
releases.summary: This release starts the drawer-shell cleanup by moving Media, Art, Collectibles, and Events detail drawers onto one shared slide-over shell while tightening the most obvious mobile spacing drift.

releases.title: v3.4.25
releases.summary: This release cleans up old release evidence examples so fixed local Playwright bypass token values are no longer preserved in committed roadmap or release-note command examples.

releases.title: v3.4.24
releases.summary: This release consolidates the repeated drawer backdrop/header image treatment into one shared frontend primitive so Media, Art, Collectibles, and Events stay visually aligned.

releases.title: v3.4.23
releases.summary: This release fixes clipped cover art in media detail drawers by giving every media drawer the same header breathing room that movie drawers already had.

releases.title: v3.4.22
releases.summary: This release cleans up mobile image uploads so choosing an existing photo and taking a new photo are separate, intentional actions instead of one ambiguous upload control that could force mobile users into the camera.

releases.title: v3.4.21
releases.summary: This release finishes the post-Vite cleanup pass by making `VITE_*` the preferred frontend build/runtime configuration path while keeping legacy `REACT_APP_*` names as compatibility shims only.

releases.title: v3.4.20
releases.summary: This release makes the public deployment path homelab-first. The repository now exposes one generated root `docker-compose.yml` for public homelab deployments, defaults the backend runtime to homelab when no private edition is explicitly configured, and moves private platform stack behavior behind untracked local/CI overrides.

releases.title: v3.4.19
releases.summary: This release makes signature proof evidence more descriptive. Art and media signature proofs can now store an evidence type, short label, and notes per proof image, while the shared multi-proof signature model and legacy primary proof projection remain compatible.
